quote: Oh my - I love this conference! Hearing from the global community that we share the passion, recognize racist systems and institutions and willingness to evolve in child welfare. [We are] working towards similar goals.

The conference was really amazing. Such an inspiring set of speakers and participants. Every session I attended was 100% worth my time and has given me lots to think about. Loved opportunities to hear from those who have varying perspectives and connecting with peers.
role: Academic, Advocate, Consultant, Trainer/Coach/Technical assistance provider

quote: Meeting and hearing from people from all over the world and learning about their work.
I enjoyed listening to people from across the world speak about their experiences in other countries. It's a wonderful connection.
I'm not sure I can pick just one. This was absolutely the most valuable and inspiring conference I've attended in terms of content, virtual or in-person, in my 25+ years in the field! Thank you!!!

It was amazing to be a part of a conference with individuals all over the world. [We] all work in the field of working with children and family. The difference and impact we all want to make and do make.

The speed networking was the most positive experience. I had such fun and learned a great deal. Many of the other workshops were excellent. The presenters across the board were extremely professional and informed. I overall loved the conference and the platform. The staff of KEMPE were available, pleasant, and very helpful.
role: Child welfare practitioner, Resource or foster parent, Trainer/Coach/Technical assistance provider

quote: [I valued] learning [about] child welfare services across the globe [and the] networking opportunities.
role: Academic, Child welfare practitioner, Community and/or neighborhood leader, Kinship care provider

quote: It was interesting to hear how systems worked in different countries across the world. Hearing from people with experience in family regulation systems and the similarities in each experience was eye opening.
Learning that the challenges I experience in my work seem to be the same all over the world.
[I valued] hearing from others around the world.

[There were] so many [positive experiences] - the parents from around the world unite was very impactful - courageous women that make their way through what must have felt impossible and go on to champion change - how they are not consumed with bitterness is a miracle.
[I] love connecting with professionals across the globe!
organizationType: Private or community-based child welfare agency/organization

quote: [I valued] being with people from all over the world in an accessible format.

I really liked hearing what others are doing all over the world. I also like that I can access the videos for a while. I will watch them! There were so many great presentations that I was not able to attend.
role: Mental health professional, Manager for prevention programs

quote: Being in fellowship with individuals across the globe.
